creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
The download details for FreeBSD 13-STABLE ISOs are non-existent at https://www.freebsd.org/where/

I was after such an ISO, but fortunately looked at the download site anyway, and found they do exist, and are updated:

https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/13.0/


Cheers, Jamie
